result.summary: Found 3 issues: one critical accessibility problem with unreadable disclaimer text, one major issue with an empty button element, and one minor layout problem with the scroll instruction section.

issues.description: The disclaimer/legal text at the bottom of the yellow bonus section is extremely small and difficult to read, compromising accessibility and legal compliance visibility
issues.suggestion: Increase font size of the disclaimer text to at least 12px and improve contrast ratio. Consider using a modal or expandable section for terms and conditions

issues.description: The orange button in the top right corner of the header appears to be empty with no visible text label or icon
issues.suggestion: Add appropriate button text (likely 'Login' or 'Register') or icon to clearly indicate the button's purpose

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' instruction section has checkmark decorations and text that appear misaligned or partially cut off, creating visual inconsistency
issues.suggestion: Adjust spacing and alignment of the checkmarks and text to ensure proper visual hierarchy and readability. Ensure all text is fully visible
